IExtendedDataApplyAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Applies the new parameter object.

C#

	IRequest request,
	Object val,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

request
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.HandlingIRequest

Type: SystemObject
Parameter object supplied by the client; may be null if the client did not specify a value.
